name: Patient 11
history: History of isolation and chronic depression since adolescence. Recent breakup preceded depressive relapse. On SSRIs with recent adjustments.
unlovable_belief: I am bound to be alone
intermediate_belief: Nothing brings me pleasure anymore; I'm broken.
intermediate_belief_depression: The depression will always come back; I'll never have a normal life.
situation: Planned sewing and work tasks, but unable to focus and watched television all day.
auto_thought: "I can't even do simple things. What's wrong with me? The medication isn't working."
behavior: Stays in pajamas, mindlessly scrolls channels, berates self for wasted day.
